disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Symmetrical bilateral swelling and pain of both wrists and the finger knuckle and middle joints, coming on over 48 hours
trigger_question_examples: Which joints are affected, and is it the same on both hands?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It's both wrists and all my finger knuckles and the middle finger joints, and it's the same on both hands — completely symmetrical.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Prolonged early-morning joint stiffness lasting more than three hours
trigger_question_examples: How long are your joints stiff for in the morning?
Does the stiffness ease as the day goes on?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: The mornings are the worst — my hands are stiff for more than three hours before they loosen up at all.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Flare began within 48 hours of running out of the regular anti-inflammatory medication
trigger_question_examples: Have you had any change to your usual medications?
When did you last take your anti-inflammatory?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I ran out of my anti-inflammatory tablets two days ago and that's when it all flared up.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Known background of being investigated for an inflammatory joint condition, with previous similar flares
trigger_question_examples: Have you had episodes like this before?
Are you being looked into for any joint condition?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Yes, I get flares like this in my joints, and I'm being investigated for an inflammatory type of arthritis.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Systemic feeling of profound fatigue and subjective (unmeasured) feverishness
trigger_question_examples: Do you feel feverish or unwell in yourself?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I feel completely wiped out and lethargic, and I think I might be running a slight temperature, but I haven't measured it.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Screening negatives for a single disproportionately hot, bright-red joint and for red streaking tracking up the forearm
trigger_question_examples: Is any one joint much more swollen, hot or bright red than the others?
Are there any red streaks spreading up your arm?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No single joint stands out as bright red or much worse than the rest, and I can't see any red streaks going up my arms — it's evenly swollen on both hands.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Severe functional impairment and social risk — lives alone and cannot open medication or safely prepare food
trigger_question_examples: Is anyone with you, and can you manage at home tonight?
Can you open your medication and prepare food?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I live on my own and right now I can't grip anything — I can't open jars, bottles or my medication, and I can't safely make food.
